{

    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying a fatal numerical contradiction and several methodological issues.",

    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, disclosing uncertainty about the Hassanpour & Mehta (1987) reference.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text, including numerical contradictions and methodological gaps.",

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying a fatal numerical contradiction and several methodological issues.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags multiple missing or wrong citations, including the Hassanpour & Mehta (1987) reference, which is likely anachronistic.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, disclosing uncertainty about the Hassanpour & Mehta (1987) reference.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text, including numerical contradictions and methodological gaps.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing a clear rationale for each recommendation.
